title: [GMod] - My entry for the Kick the Arthuur Collab
description:
This is my entry for a collab made by HalBuzzKill, involving a certain lol-cow getting humiliated in many possible ways. Mine is aimed for a more comedic-esque humiliation, and some mental humiliation as well.
